creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Fri, June 29, 2007 4:54 pm, Yan wrote:

>>Description:
> we would like to have our company added to your commercial vendors list.

Hello!

Great! Please look at the current commercial entries at
http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/ and reply to this email
(make sure that freebsd-gnats-submit@freebsd.org is included!!)
with a valid text that we can use to add your company.

Thanks!
Best Regards,
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
